impact: This gives the PP&D daemon a deterministic committed fixture showing the expected compact persistence shape for parse-loop failures without retaining raw model output, supporting the checkbox-184 recovery path while avoiding DevHub, crawler, extraction, logic, and private artifact changes.
summary: Adds a fixture-only daemon prompt artifact for repeated non-JSON LLM responses on blocked PP&D tasks.
target_task: Task checkbox-184: Add a fixture-only daemon prompt fixture proving repeated non-JSON LLM responses for a blocked PP&D task are summarized into target_task, failure_kind, compact_raw_response_summary, and next_action_hint fields without storing the full raw response.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
